name: WithContext

unions.name: WithContext
unions.comment:
An opaque type for representing `Html` with a context.

  - A `Node` is a wrapper for "a function that can take a list of functions that take a context and return a `Html` value, and return a function that takes a context and returns a `Html` value".
  - A `Leaf` is a wrapper for "a function that takes a context, and returns a `Html` value".

values.name: lift
values.comment:
This function is supposed to be used with functions in `WithContext.Lazy`.
Please see [actual use case](https://github.com/arowM/elm-css-modules-helper/tree/master/examples/real-world) for detail.
values.type: (context -> subContext) -> WithContext.WithContext subContext msg -> WithContext.WithContext context msg

values.name: node
values.type: (context -> List.List (Html.Styled.Html msg) -> Html.Styled.Html msg) -> List.List (WithContext.WithContext context msg) -> WithContext.WithContext context msg

values.name: text
values.comment: Text node. We have to explicitly define this, because it's the only `Html` function that doesn't take a `List Html msg` as an argument.

values.name: toHtml
values.type: context -> WithContext.WithContext context msg -> Html.Styled.Html msg

name: WithContext.Lazy

values.name: lazy
values.comment: Similar to `fromHtml` but this function does some sort of performance optimization that delays the building of virtual DOM nodes.
values.type: (context -> a -> Html.Styled.Html msg) -> a -> WithContext.WithContext context msg

values.name: lazy2
values.comment: Same as `lazy`, but checks on two arguments.
values.type: (context -> a -> b -> Html.Styled.Html msg) -> a -> b -> WithContext.WithContext context msg

values.name: lazy3
values.comment: Same as `lazy`, but checks on three arguments.
values.type: (context -> a -> b -> c -> Html.Styled.Html msg) -> a -> b -> c -> WithContext.WithContext context msg

values.name: lazy4
values.comment: Same as `lazy`, but checks on four arguments.
values.type: (context -> a -> b -> c -> d -> Html.Styled.Html msg) -> a -> b -> c -> d -> WithContext.WithContext context msg

values.name: lazy5
values.comment: Same as `lazy`, but checks on five arguments.
values.type: (context -> a -> b -> c -> d -> e -> Html.Styled.Html msg) -> a -> b -> c -> d -> e -> WithContext.WithContext context msg

values.name: lazy6
values.comment: Same as `lazy`, but checks on six arguments.
values.type: (context -> a -> b -> c -> d -> e -> f -> Html.Styled.Html msg) -> a -> b -> c -> d -> e -> f -> WithContext.WithContext context msg
